Mahesh Bhimalingam, Bloomberg Intelligence global head of credit strategy, discusses the results of the BI 3Q26 Investor Survey and the market outlook with David Fancourt, high yield fund manager at M&G Investments. They discuss valuations and central bank actions, along with distress and default rates. This podcast also covers survey results on investor positioning, sentiment, key r

title: Chip Stocks Sink After Blistering Run as Oil Jumps: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 随着石油价格上涨，芯片股在大幅上涨后下跌：市场结束
summary: Wall Street was rattled by a selloff in chipmakers on concerns over whether massive artificial-intelligence investments will justify lofty valuations while a jump in oil prices boosted bond yields.

title: Oil Jumps After Ship Strikes Spur US to Revoke Iran Sales Waiver
title_cn: 船只袭击后油价飙升促使美国撤销伊朗销售豁免
summary: Oil climbed almost 6% after attacks on Persian Gulf shipping prompted the US to revoke a waiver that had relaxed restrictions on Iranian crude sales.

title: Gold Slumps as Traders Weigh Fed Rate Path After Iran Oil Waiver
title_cn: 伊朗石油豁免后，交易员权衡美联储利率走势，金价暴跌
summary: Gold slumped after the US Treasury Department revoked a waiver allowing the sale of Iranian oil, stoking concern that elevated energy prices will prompt the Federal Reserve to raise interest rates.

title: Soccer Shows the Real Bull Case for Europe
title_cn: 足球展现了欧洲真正的牛市前景
summary: Can you put a price on history?

title: Canadians Skeptical of Carney’s Push to Open Airports to Private Investment
title_cn: 加拿大人对卡尼推动向私人投资开放机场持怀疑态度
summary: A slim majority of Canadians oppose allowing private investment in airports, a new poll shows, as Prime Minister Mark Carney explores selling stakes in the publicly owned facilities to unlock funding for major infrastructure projects.

title: Hedge Funds Shake Off Brutal March to Post Best Half Since 2021
title_cn: 对冲基金摆脱残酷的三月，创下 2021 年以来最好的一半
summary: The brutal March that battered some of the world’s biggest hedge funds is already fading into the background as the firms reported their strongest first-half results in five years.

title: US Revokes Waiver Allowing Iran Oil Sales After Attacks
title_cn: 美国撤销袭击后允许伊朗石油销售的豁免
summary: The US Treasury Department revoked a waiver that allowed the sale of Iranian oil in response to attacks on tankers in the Strait of Hormuz, jeopardizing an interim peace deal between Washington and Tehran.

title: NYC Is Racing to Secure ‘Unstable’ Midtown Manhattan Building
title_cn: 纽约市正在竞相保护“不稳定”的曼哈顿中城大楼
summary: New York City officials were racing to stabilize a high-rise building in the heart of Manhattan after cracks developed in multiple columns and floors began to sag, leading to the evacuation of nearby office buildings and a school during the height of the morning rush. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Sports-Related Deals on the Rise: William Blair
title_cn: 体育相关交易不断增加：威廉·布莱尔
summary: Acquisitions in the sports industry are set to increase as investors leverage a slew of different approaches to the fast-growing sector, according to William Blair & Co.’s head of investment banking.

title: US Debt, Global Fiscal Ratios Still Concerning, Says Citi's DeQuadros
title_cn: 花旗的 DeQuadros 表示，美国债务和全球财政比率仍令人担忧
summary:
Conrad DeQuadros, Citi Wealth head of economics, said that the level of US debt and questions around fiscal ratios across the globe are still a point of concern for economists even as the economy is in good shape. 
DeQuadros said that questions the amount of room the deficit has a stabilizing force given a potential economic downturn.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Private Equity's Next Sports Play
title_cn: 私募股权的下一场体育赛事
summary: Wall Street is making a bigger bet on sports. William Blair's acquisition of Inner Circle Sports underscores why investors see enormous opportunity in pro teams, women's sports and college athletics. Inner Circle Sports Founder Rob Tilliss and William Blair's Global Head of Investment Banking Matt Zimmer join Open Interest to explain what's driving soaring franchise values and why they believe the industry's biggest growth is still ahead. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Fed Proposes Changes to Anti-Money Laundering Rules for Banks
title_cn: 美联储提议修改银行反洗钱规则
summary: The Federal Reserve proposed changes to anti-money laundering requirements for banks, the latest step by US regulators looking to zero in on what they see as core financial risks.

title: Jefferies Shops $5 Billion Debt for Icahn’s Possible Caesars Bid
title_cn: 杰富瑞 (Jefferies) 为伊坎可能收购凯撒 (Caesars) 的收购案支付 50 亿美元债务
summary: Jefferies Financial Group Inc. is gauging interest from investors to raise roughly $5 billion in debt to support Carl Icahn in a possible rival bid for Caesars Entertainment Inc., according to people with knowledge of the matter.

title: Canada Offers Teck C$400 Million to Grow Strategic Metals Output
title_cn: 加拿大向 Teck 提供 4 亿加元以增加战略金属产量
summary: The Canadian government said it would contribute as much as C$400 million ($282 million) to Teck Resources Ltd.’s plans to boost metals output from a key refinery, creating a deal that could ensure Canada receives a portion of future germanium, antimony and gallium supply.

title: Trump's Been Successful in Talking Down The 'Oil Markets' Says Kloza
title_cn: 克洛扎表示，特朗普成功地淡化了“石油市场”
summary: Oil nudged higher following attacks on shipping in and around the Strait of Hormuz, pointing to continued risks to vessels in the critical waterway. Tom Kloza, Chief Energy Advisor for Gulf Oil joins to discuss this as well as how the oil markets are reacting to the recent uptick in attacks in the Strait of Hormuz. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Anthropic Says Claude Can Mimic How The Human Brain Processes Information
title_cn: Anthropic 称克劳德可以模仿人脑处理信息的方式
summary: Yesterday Anthropic launched a video stating that Claude was able to mimic how the human brain processes information. Calling 'the collection of these patterns the J-space—named after the technique we used to find them, involving a mathematical concept called the Jacobian." Miriam Vogel, President and CEO of EqualAI joins to discuss this as well as what this revelation means for future of AI.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: NATO Agrees to $50 Billion in Defense Deals to Placate Trump
title_cn: 北约同意签署 500 亿美元防务协议安抚特朗普
summary: NATO allies have agreed to at least $50 billion in defense industry deals to show US President Donald Trump that Europe is heeding his spending demands. Melinda Haring, nonresident senior fellow at the Atlantic Council, joined Balance of Power to discuss this as well as the war in Ukraine. She said Ukraine's strategy to compel Russian President Vladimir Putin to the negotiating table is working. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Amazon’s New Bonds Get Cooler Reception as AI Debt Floods Market
title_cn: 随着人工智能债务涌入市场，亚马逊的新债券受到冷遇
summary: When Amazon.com Inc. sold its biggest ever bond earlier this year, it was inundated with investor orders amid hype about the artificial intelligence boom. This time around, there’s less fanfare.

title: Brazil Treasury Has Patience and Cash to Ease Local Bond Stress
title_cn: 巴西财政部有耐心和现金来缓解当地债券压力
summary: Brazil’s Treasury is ready to step up actions to alleviate stress in the nation’s 2.3-trillion-real ($447 billion) inflation-linked bond market that has been hit by shifting demand and investors’ concerns about public spending.

title: World Cup Fails to Boost Mexico’s Beleaguered Airport Industry
title_cn: 世界杯未能提振陷入困境的墨西哥机场业
summary: Shares across Mexican airport operators fell Tuesday after June traffic figures disappointed expectations that the FIFA World Cup would provide a boost to an industry beset by problems.

title: Wild Coffee Swings Usher in New Era of Market Volatility
title_cn: 野生咖啡波动迎来市场波动的新时代
summary: A sudden burst of extreme price volatility in the coffee market has caught traders and analysts off-guard and left them bracing for more instability.

title: Samsung Soars as Chip Stocks Slide | Open Interest 7/7/2026
title_cn: 芯片股下滑，三星股价飙升未平仓合约 7/7/2026
summary: Get a jump start on the US trading day with Dani Burger on "Bloomberg Open Interest." Samsung posts record profits, but chip stocks slide as investors demand even more from the AI trade. SpaceX heads for the Nasdaq 100, while some look for ways to avoid the name. Rising Strait of Hormuz tensions add fresh risk as President Trump arrives at NATO. Plus, BlackRock’s Jean Boivin on AI’s biggest winners, Amazon’s AI spending debate, and the $14.5 billion chip chemicals deal reshaping M&A. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Chile’s New Pension Rules Spark Industry Divide on Effects
title_cn: 智利新养老金规则引发行业影响分歧
summary: Analysts, strategists and investors are struggling to weigh the impact — if any — a new investment regime for Chile’s pension funds will have on the broader market.

title: Italy Sells $6 Billion in First Dollar-Bond Sale Since 2021
title_cn: 意大利自 2021 年以来首次发行 60 亿美元美元债券
summary: Italy returned to bond market for the first time since the pandemic, broadening its pool of foreign investors after the country’s improving finances won credit-rating upgrades.

title: Oil Climbs as Fresh Tanker Strike Highlights Risks Around Hormuz
title_cn: 新一轮油轮罢工凸显霍尔木兹地区风险，油价攀升
summary:
Mike McGlone, Senior Commodity Strategist for Bloomberg Intelligence, joined Bloomberg's Paul Sweeney and Stacey Vanek Smith to talk the uncertain oil market during the ongoing conflict in Iran.
 Oil nudged higher following attacks on shipping in and around the Strait of Hormuz, highlighting continued risks to vessels in the critical waterway.
Brent traded near $73 a barrel. A laden liquefied natural gas carrier, Al Rekayyat, was hit by a projectile near the Omani coast as it exited the waterway. Axios reported that two vessels were hit and suffered damage. 
The world’s biggest shipping trade group said transits through Hormuz may dip after the latest incidents, though there will still be shipowners willing to take the risk of crossing. A convoy of vessels, including oil tankers, appeared to be making its way along the Oman route on Tuesday. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Samsung’s Record Profit Fails to Impress After AI Chip Rally
title_cn: AI芯片上涨后，三星创纪录的利润未能给人留下深刻印象
summary:
For years, the Magnificent Seven tech giants commanded investors’ attention, dominating the S&P 500 Index and determining which way the overall stock market was headed. Those days are over.
While the technology-heavy Nasdaq 100 Index is up 16% in 2026 and the S&P 500 has climbed 10%, an index of the Mag 7 has gained just 1.7%. 
Ed Ludlow, BTech Anchor, addresses the top tech stories, including the Mag 7 struggling to keep a hold on the markets and Samsung's profit failing to impress. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Hyperscalers Look ‘Downright Cheap’ to Morgan Stanley’s Shalett
title_cn: 摩根士丹利的 Shalett 认为超大规模企业“非常便宜”
summary: Morgan Stanley’s Lisa Shalett has one message for investors: Don’t count the Magnificent Seven out.

title: Getty’s Lenders Organize on Renewed Risk of ‘Unsustainable’ Debt
title_cn: 盖蒂的贷方组织起来应对“不可持续”债务的新风险
summary: Lenders to Getty Images Holdings Inc. have started to organize after the debt-laden photo archive business scrapped a planned merger with Shutterstock Inc., according to people familiar with the matter.

title: 'We Assume Immigration Policy Returns to Baseline in 2029' Says Martha Gimbel
title_cn: 玛莎·金贝尔 (Martha Gimbel) 表示，“我们假设移民政策将在 2029 年恢复到基线”
summary: Martha Gimbel, Executive Director at Yale Budget Lab, discusses immigration, debt, AI and the labor market. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Tech Stocks Fall on Semis Weakness; SpaceX Gets Bullish Calls
title_cn: 科技股因半成品疲软而下跌； SpaceX 受到看好
summary: US technology shares extended declines on Tuesday after earnings from Samsung Electronics Co. failed to satisfy investors, spurring worries over the durability of this year’s red-hot artificial intelligence trade.

title: Market Strategist Highlights High Earnings Expectations Amid AI Sector Concentration
title_cn: 市场策略师强调人工智能行业集中度较高的盈利预期
summary: Jordan Jackson, Global Market Strategist at JPMorgan Asset Management, discussed the approaching earnings season and the challenges posed by elevated market expectations. While S&P 500 earnings growth is projected at over 20% for the quarter, excluding technology sectors reduces growth estimates to around 11%, which still represents solid double-digit expansion. He speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Treasuries Slide as Oil Surges, Amazon Sets Jumbo Bond Sale
title_cn: 随着石油价格飙升，美国国债下滑，亚马逊推出巨额债券发售
summary: Treasuries fell as oil prices surged on signs of renewed threats to Middle East supply and Amazon.com led the corporate new-issue with an offering expected to raise at least $25 billion.

title: Traders Dump Tech Bonds to Make Room for Amazon Debt Deal
title_cn: 交易员抛售科技债券，为亚马逊债务交易腾出空间
summary: Amazon.com Inc.’s massive bond sale dragged down hyperscaler debt on Tuesday as investors sold existing securities to fund the new issue, signaling growing fatigue over the barrage of artificial intelligence financings.

title: What China’s Latest Missile Test Reveals About Its Expanding Arsenal
title_cn: 中国最新的导弹试验揭示了其不断扩大的武库
summary: The high-profile launch of a nuclear-capable missile signals a new normal for China’s traditionally secretive military.

title: Bloomberg Crypto 7/7/2026
title_cn: 彭博加密货币 7/7/2026
summary: "Bloomberg Crypto" covers the people, transactions, and technology shaping the world of decentralized finance. Today's guests: Ice-OKX Joint Venture Co-Chair & Former New York Governor Andrew Cuomo, Figure Co-Founder Executive Chairman Mike Cagney, BitGo CEO Michael Belshe, and Lyn Alden Investment Strategy Founder Strategist Lyn Alden. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Circle Under Pressure After Open USD Launch
title_cn: 美元开放后，Circle 面临压力
summary:
Bloomberg Intelligences Dushyant Shahrawat joins Katie Greifeld and Isabelle Lee on "Bloomberg Crypto." Circle shares fell dramatically on last week, after a consortium of firms across payments, finance, tech and crypto — including its distribution partner Coinbase Global Inc. — unveiled a new stablecoin that will compete with Circle’s own.
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Strategy Sells $216M of Bitcoin as It Begins Overhaul
title_cn: Strategy 在开始改革之际出售了 2.16 亿美元的比特币
summary: Lyn Alden, founder strategist at Lyn Alden Investment Strategy, joins Katie Greifeld and Isabelle Lee on "Bloomberg Crypto." They discuss Michael Saylor’s Strategy, which sold $216 million of Bitcoin last week, marking the first major step in the financing overhaul the company unveiled in recent days after a prolonged slump in the cryptocurrency and its own shares. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Semiconductor Worker Shortfall Endangers US Chip Factory Revival
title_cn: 半导体工人短缺危及美国芯片厂复兴
summary: A growing nationwide shortage of high-skilled workers threatens to delay construction of billions of dollars in new semiconductor plants across the US and constrain future chip production unless the industry pools resources and the government keeps up funding, according to a new report.

title: Job Cuts Were Necessary: BitGo CEO
title_cn: BitGo 首席执行官：裁员是必要的
summary: Mike Belshe, CEO of BitGo, joins Katie Greifeld and Isabelle Lee on "Bloomberg Crypto." The company recently announced a nearly 15% reduction in their workforce. This comes less than six months after the company went public. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Robinhood Rolls Out Perpetual Futures in Europe
title_cn: Robinhood 在欧洲推出永续期货
summary: Bloomberg's Anna Irrera joins Katie Greifeld and Isabelle Lee on "Bloomberg Crypto."  Robinhood is rolling out perpetual futures tied to commodities, ETFs, and currencies in Europe, seeking to capitalize on the rise in round-the-clock trading that’s long been a feature of crypto markets. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: BC Eyes Legal Action Against OpenAI in Wake of Mass Shooting
title_cn: 大规模枪击事件发生后，BC 省拟对 OpenAI 采取法律行动
summary: British Columbia is exploring legal action against OpenAI for its failure to alert authorities to threats made on ChatGPT before the February mass shooting in the town of Tumbler Ridge.

title: We Are A Blockchain Capital Market: Cagney
title_cn: 我们是区块链资本市场：卡格尼
summary:
Mike Cagney, co-founder and executive chairman of Figure, joins Katie Greifeld and Isabelle Lee on "Bloomberg Crypto." Figure Technology is acquiring Kiavi, a leading lender to home flippers and smaller landlords in the US, and forming a joint venture with Sixth Street to buy an accompanying loan portfolio.
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Andrew Cuomo Discusses OKX, Clarity Act, 24/7 Trading
title_cn: 安德鲁·科莫讨论 OKX、澄清法案、24/7 交易
summary: Andrew Cuomo, former New York governor and co-chair of the ICE-OKX Joint Venture, joins Katie Greifeld and Isabelle Lee on "Bloomberg Crypto." Cuomo is starting a second act: helping cryptocurrency exchange operator OKX and the owner of the New York Stock Exchange build a new business that merges digital and traditional finance markets. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AI Chip Selloff Spreads Across Global Markets | Bloomberg Tech 7/07/2026
title_cn: AI芯片抛售席卷全球市场彭博科技 7/07/2026
summary: Bloomberg’s Ed Ludlow breaks down Samsung's quarterly profit that surged on memory demand, and why it still wasn't enough for investors. Plus, Amazon is back in the bond market, looking to raise at least $25 billion to fund spending on AI infrastructure; and SpaceX joins the Nasdaq 100 Index as sell-side coverage of Elon Musk's company kicks off. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Amazon Fuels AI Debt Boom With Another Bond Sale
title_cn: 亚马逊再次发行债券，推动人工智能债务繁荣
summary: Amazon is looking to raise at least $25 billion from a US dollar bond sale, marking its latest jumbo debt offering as the tech giant ramps up spending on artificial intelligence infrastructure. Bloomberg Intelligence analyst Robert Schiffman joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bullish on SpaceX Long Term: ERShares' Shulman
title_cn: ERShares 的 Shulman 长期看好 SpaceX
summary: SpaceX is benefiting from a shift towards AI, with broker calls coming out as the company gets included to the Nasdaq 100. This is setting a price floor for a stock that could be headed for the stars, says Joel Shulman, Founder & CIO of ERShares, whose ETF XOVR holds approximately $246 million in SpaceX exposure. He sits down with Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Magnificent Seven Tech Stocks Lose Market Swagger
title_cn: 七大科技股失去市场霸气
summary: For years, the Magnificent Seven tech giants commanded investors’ attention, dominating the S&P 500 Index and determining which way the overall stock market was headed. Those days are over: Bloomberg's Ryan Vlastelica joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech" to explain why. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Meta Debuts New AI Image-Generation Model Inside Chatbot, Instagram
title_cn: Meta 在聊天机器人、Instagram 中首次推出新的人工智能图像生成模型
summary: Meta Platforms Inc. debuted a new image-generation artificial intelligence model, its first such release since the company spent billions to rebuild its AI lab under Chief AI Officer Alexandr Wang a year ago.

title: Solstice Buys Element Solutions
title_cn: Solstice 收购 Element Solutions
summary: Element Solutions CEO Ben Gliklich joins Open Interest to break down why Solstice’s $14.5 billion takeover offer was too compelling to pass up, explaining how the combined company could become a bigger player in semiconductor materials, AI data-center cooling and critical US  supply chains. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Microsoft Replaces OpenAI, Anthropic With Own AI in Some Apps
title_cn: 微软在一些应用程序中用自己的人工智能取代了 OpenAI、Anthropic
summary: Microsoft Corp., looking to reduce AI costs, is starting to replace OpenAI and Anthropic with its own models in software products like Excel and Outlook.

title: Behind Xbox’s Big Layoffs, a Streaming Strategy That Failed
title_cn: Xbox大裁员背后，失败的流媒体策略
summary: Microsoft Corp.’s Xbox spent nearly $80 billion in the last decade on deals that would give it popular video game titles like Call of Duty and Skyrim, betting that gamers would flock to its Netflix-like subscription service offering hundreds of options for endless play.

title: AI Fuels Record M&A Boom
title_cn: 人工智能推动创纪录的并购热潮
summary: Record M&A volumes are being driven by AI, abundant capital, and a more deal-friendly regulatory environment, but Jones Day's Robert Profusek says private equity is still on the sidelines because sellers' expectations remain too high. He also warns that AI valuations are reaching unprecedented levels, raising questions about whether today's deal boom can last. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX’s Biggest Bull Sees Valuation Soaring Above $10 Trillion
title_cn: SpaceX最大看涨者认为估值飙升至10万亿美元以上
summary: SpaceX has no shortage of fans on Wall Street, but one analyst stands out among the rest as by far the most bullish: Raymond James’ Brian Gesuale.

title: Chip Stocks Tumble on AI Anxiety as Oil Climbs
title_cn: 随着油价上涨，芯片股因人工智能焦虑而暴跌
summary:
A selloff in chipmakers dragged down stocks on concerns over whether massive artificial-intelligence investments will justify lofty valuations.
Julian Emanuel, Chief Equity & Quantitative Strategist at Evercore ISI, discusses his S&P 500 call amid recent volatility. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Elon Musk's SpaceX to Join the Nasdaq 100 Index
title_cn: 埃隆·马斯克 (Elon Musk) 的 SpaceX 将加入纳斯达克 100 指数
summary:
SpaceX joins the Nasdaq 100 Index Tuesday and many analysts are saying buy the stock. But Nicholas Owens of Morningstar has a sell rating and price target of $62. He says shares are overvalued. He speaks on "Bloomberg Surveillance."
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Amazon Seeks to Raise at Least $25 Billion to Fund AI Spending
title_cn: 亚马逊寻求筹集至少 250 亿美元来资助人工智能支出
summary: Amazon.com is looking to raise at least $25 billion from a US dollar bond sale, its latest funding push as the company ramps up investment in AI infrastructure. Robert Schiffman and Ed Ludlow have more on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Apollo’s Slok Says S&P 493’s Stalled Margins Are a Big-Tech Risk
title_cn: Apollo 的 Slok 表示 S&P 493 的利润率停滞不前是科技股的一大风险
summary: Apollo Global Management Inc.’s Torsten Slok warned that companies outside the giants of the technology sector are failing to show gains in profitability from their spending on artificial intelligence, posing risks to Big Tech valuations.

title: Wall Street Unleashes Bullish SpaceX Ratings Eyeing 47% Upside
title_cn: 华尔街释放乐观情绪 SpaceX 评级有望上涨 47%
summary: Wall Street’s biggest banks shopped SpaceX shares for $135 a pop during its record initial public offering. Just weeks later, sell-side analysts from many of those same banks are telling clients those shares should be worth $236 each on average.

title: Le Pen Says She’ll Run in France’s 2027 Presidential Race
title_cn: 勒庞表示她将参加 2027 年法国总统竞选
summary: Marine Le Pen, France’s far-right leader for two decades, intends to make her fourth presidential run even after an appellate panel ordered her to wear an electronic-monitoring device when it upheld her conviction for misusing public funds.

title: NATO Tries to Keep Trump Onside | Balance of Power 7/7/2026
title_cn: 北约试图让特朗普站在一边权力平衡 7/7/2026
summary: On the early edition of Balance of Power, Bloomberg Washington Correspondents Joe Mathieu and Kailey Leinz discuss the NATO Summit in Ankara. On today's show, Atlantic Council Nonresident Senior Fellow Melinda Haring, Stonecourt Capital Partner Rick Davis, Harvard Kennedy School Ash Center Visiting Democracy Fellow Jeanne Sheehan Zaino and Gulf Oil Chief Energy Advisor Tom Kloza. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Signals Shift in Ties With Turkey at NATO Summit
title_cn: 特朗普在北约峰会上暗示与土耳其关系发生转变
summary: President Donald Trump said he may lift sanctions on Turkey and consider selling F-35 fighter jets to the country. He spoke to Turkish President Recep Tayyip Erdogan before a meeting on the sidelines of the NATO summit in Ankara. Bloomberg's Annmarie Hordern is travelling with the president and has more.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: UK Seeks to Merge Defense Group With Canada’s Rival ‘Bomb Bank’
title_cn: 英国寻求将国防集团与加拿大竞争对手“炸弹银行”合并
summary: The UK is talking with Canada about combining their defense financing initiatives, with neither reaching a critical mass of support for its plan.

title: Barrett, Kagan to Appear at Hearings on Supreme Court Budget
title_cn: 巴雷特和卡根将出席最高法院预算听证会
summary: Justices Amy Coney Barrett and Elena Kagan will revive public discussion of the US Supreme Court budget when they testify before congressional panels as the court seeks more money for security and other priorities.

title: Prosecutors Present New Footage of Charlie Kirk Shooting Suspect
title_cn: 检察官展示查理·柯克射杀嫌疑人的新镜头
summary: The man accused in the shooting death of Charlie Kirk at a college campus in Utah last year interacted with members of the conservative commentator’s Turning Point USA organization the morning of the killing, an investigator told a judge Tuesday.

title: Trump’s Top Air Pollution Regulator Is Resigning From EPA
title_cn: 特朗普的最高空气污染监管机构将从美国环保局辞职
summary: The top air pollution regulator at the US Environmental Protection Agency is resigning.

title: Farage Wagers He Can Outrun His Troubles With Election Ploy
title_cn: 法拉奇打赌他可以通过选举策略摆脱困境
summary: Nigel Farage’s shock decision to quit as MP so he can fight again for the seat he won two years ago puts the poll-topping Reform leader back where he’s happiest: at the center of Britain’s attention.

title: Iran Mines Meant to Steer Ships Near Its Shore, US Navy Says
title_cn: 美国海军称伊朗布雷旨在引导船只靠近其海岸
summary: Iran’s Strait of Hormuz mining strategy is intended to channel commercial shipping into sea lanes near its shores, making it easier to control traffic and collect tolls, the US Navy’s top military official said today.

title: US Merger Suits Stall Under DOJ Boss Who Opposes Blocking Deals
title_cn: 美国司法部老板反对阻止交易，美国合并诉讼陷入僵局
summary: A nearly $1 billion takeover by a defense supplier that Pentagon officials previously faulted for overcharging the military may serve as the latest test of how light a touch the US Justice Department is willing to take on corporate mergers.

title: Farage Just Rolled the Dice
title_cn: 法拉奇刚刚掷骰子
summary: Under pressure from a growing number of corruption probes, Nigel Farage used a surprise “important announcement” to launch a slow-motion temper tantrum, Bloomberg Opinion columnist Rosa Prince says. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Democratic Senators Probe Scope of Trump’s IRS Immunity Deal
title_cn: 民主党参议员调查特朗普国税局豁免协议的范围
summary: Three Democratic senators are investigating a US government agreement barring past tax probes of President Donald Trump and his businesses, saying they want to determine whether the deal also protects companies affiliated with his family.

title: Le Pen Cleared by Court to Run in 2027 French Presidential Election
title_cn: 法院批准勒庞参加 2027 年法国总统选举
summary: Marine Le Pen was cleared to enter the 2027 French presidential race after appeal judges shortened her election ban, yet upheld her conviction for embezzling European Union funds.

title: Ghana Asks Ramaphosa to Defer Visit Over Xenophobic Attacks
title_cn: 加纳因仇外袭击要求拉马福萨推迟访问
summary: Ghana asked South African President Cyril Ramaphosa to postpone a visit in August, following recent anti-immigrant protests in the southern African nation that claimed the life of a Ghanaian citizen.

title: Midtown Manhattan Building Unstable After Columns Buckle, Mamdani Says
title_cn: 马姆达尼表示，曼哈顿中城大楼的柱子折断后不稳定
summary: A Midtown Manhattan building under construction is unstable and a collapse warning has been issued. City officials say two columns on the 21st floor buckled and bricks were reported falling to the streets below. No one has been hurt. The building is at 235 East 42nd Street. New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani said at a news conference that other buildings and a school have been evacuated while the site is secured.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Cuba Blames US as It Tries to Restore Power After Blackout
title_cn: 古巴在停电后试图恢复供电，指责美国
summary: A US energy blockade is hampering Cuba’s attempts to restore electricity almost 24 hours after a nationwide blackout hit the communist-run island, officials said.

title: Le Pen Cleared to Run in 2027 French Presidential Election
title_cn: 勒庞获准参加 2027 年法国总统选举
summary: Marine Le Pen was cleared to enter the 2027 French presidential race after appeal judges shortened her election ban, yet upheld her conviction for embezzling European Union funds. Caroline Connan explains what happens next (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Hormuz Sees Biggest Day of Attacks Since US-Iran Peace Deal
title_cn: 霍尔木兹遭遇美伊和平协议以来最大规模袭击
summary: Three ships were attacked in the Strait of Hormuz, heightening unease among shipowners and testing a US-Iran agreement to halt attacks.

title: Lawsuit Accuses US of Giving Secret Data to Iran on Asylum Seekers
title_cn: 诉讼指控美国向伊朗提供有关寻求庇护者的秘密数据
summary: A lawsuit claims the Trump administration is unlawfully giving confidential personal information to Iran about Iranians who applied for asylum to avoid “grave danger” in their native country.

title: Qatar’s Role as US-Iran Mediator Jeopardized by Shipping Attacks
title_cn: 卡塔尔作为美伊调解者的角色因航运袭击而受到威胁
summary: The targeting of a Qatari tanker near the Strait of Hormuz has imperiled the Gulf state’s role as one of the primary mediators between the US and Iran.

title: Colombia’s Incoming Leader Boycotts Transition Process
title_cn: 哥伦比亚新​​任领导人抵制过渡进程
summary: Colombian president-elect Abelardo de la Espriella said he’s suspending transition meetings with the outgoing government, as tensions escalate ahead of the Aug. 7 handover.

title: Finland Warns Europe Risks Shortage of Soldiers Willing to Fight
title_cn: 芬兰警告欧洲面临缺乏愿意作战的士兵的风险
summary: Europe’s biggest defense challenge is finding enough people to serve in the military and strengthening the public’s willingness to fight on behalf of their countries, Finnish Defense Minister Antti Häkkänen said in an interview.

title: Farage Seeks Fresh Mandate Amid Gifts Investigation
title_cn: 法拉奇在礼物调查中寻求新的授权
summary: Why is Reform UK leader Nigel Farage resigning right now? Lucy White explains. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: NATO Closes In On Deal to Extend Cold War-Era Pipelines East
title_cn: 北约即将达成向东延伸冷战时期管道的协议
summary: NATO allies are close to a landmark agreement to extend a Cold War-era fuel pipeline network to eastern Europe and Turkey, aiming to ensure those countries can get supplies in a crisis.
